name: Coorg
description: Known as the Scotland of India, Coorg is a misty hill station famous for coffee plantations, lush greenery, and waterfalls.

name: Wayanad
description: A lush green hill district in Kerala known for its wildlife sanctuaries, ancient caves, and spice plantations.

name: Munnar
description: A stunning hill station surrounded by rolling tea plantations and misty mountains in the Western Ghats.

name: Ooty
description: The Queen of Hill Stations, Ooty offers scenic beauty with its botanical gardens, lakes, and the famous Nilgiri Mountain Railway.

name: Goa
description: India's premier beach destination known for its vibrant nightlife, Portuguese heritage architecture, and coastal cuisine.

name: Jaipur
description: The Pink City, known for its grand forts, palaces, vibrant bazaars, and rich Rajasthani culture.

name: Udaipur
description: The City of Lakes, known for its romantic setting, magnificent palaces, and lakeside hotels.

name: Manali
description: A popular hill station in the mountains of Himachal Pradesh, known for adventure sports, hot springs, and snow-capped peaks.

name: Rishikesh
description: The Yoga Capital of the World, situated on the banks of the Ganges, known for adventure activities and spiritual retreats.

name: Pondicherry
description: A charming coastal city with French colonial architecture, serene beaches, and spiritual centres.
